extDescription.message: Hides, dims, and/or auto-skips videos you've already watched on YouTube (detected by the red progress bar).

hideSub.message: Hides or dims already-watched videos in lists

skipSub.message: Advances if a Mix/playlist lands on a watched one

skipAutoplaySub.message: Experimental: on a watch page, jumps to the next unwatched related video

surfacesSub.message: Choose which pages this runs on

whitelistSub.message: Artists/channels or keywords, one per line

whitelistPlaceholder.message:
e.g.: Yung Lean
LIL UZI VERT
lo-fi

footer.message: Detects via the thumbnail's red progress bar.
